tweets.topic: Supply-chain scam: Ahmedabad police dismantle gadget-swapping interstate syndicate
tweets.tweet: Ahmedabad police busted an interstate gadget-swapping syndicate that was duping consumers across India with fake devices. So your "new" phone might actually be someone else's refurbished nightmare — trust no one selling tech on the streets. #FraudAlert #IndianTech

tweets.topic: SBI warns customers: Scammers are sending fake 'bank letters' with these app links
tweets.tweet: SBI issued a warning that scammers are distributing fraudulent bank letters containing malicious app links to steal customer credentials. Looks like your inbox just became a minefield — delete first, think later, because your bank account depends on it.

tweets.topic: How safe are you from fraud during Amazon and Flipkart's Republic Day sales, and can cyber insurance...
tweets.tweet: Amazon and Flipkart's Republic Day sales expose millions to fraud risks, but cyber insurance policies remain expensive and poorly understood by most Indians. Your ₹50,000 shopping spree could vanish in seconds — and recovery takes months if your insurance even covers it.

tweets.topic: Ai+ Pulse 2 launches at ₹5,999 with 6,000mAh battery, 50MP camera
tweets.tweet: AI+ Pulse 2 launched in India at ₹5,999 featuring a 6,000mAh battery and 50MP camera for budget buyers. Finally a decent phone under ₹6,000 that won't make you choose between battery life and decent photos. #BudgetTech #IndianTech

tweets.topic: OnePlus 15T Launched With 7,500mAh Battery, Dual 50-Megapixel Cameras: Price, Specifications
tweets.tweet: OnePlus 15T launched in India at ₹49,999 with a massive 7500mAh battery and dual 50MP cameras. Finally a phone that won't die before your workday ends — but will your wallet survive? #OnePlus #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Jio offers to install neutral telecom infra in underground Metro 3; Airtel and Vi back it
tweets.tweet: Jio proposes installing neutral telecom infrastructure in Mumbai's Metro 3 underground, with Airtel and Vi supporting the initiative. Finally, our metro commutes might have actual 4G coverage instead of watching the loading spinner for 20 minutes. #Jio #IndianTelecom

tweets.topic: Revealed: Real reason why mobile data in India is cheaper than Pakistan, China, more details inside
tweets.tweet: Mobile data in India costs ₹0.26 per GB, making it the cheapest globally compared to Pakistan's ₹1.2 and China's ₹0.89 per GB. Indian telecom competition is ruthless, but remember you're paying for it with constant ads and data throttling. #IndianTelecom #DataWars

tweets.topic: Internet subscribers in India grew 1.1% in October-December 2025 quarter: TRAI
tweets.tweet: Internet subscribers in India grew 1.1% in the October-December 2025 quarter, reaching record numbers according to TRAI data. Congrats on the slowest growth rate ever — at this pace, we'll have universal internet access by 2047. #IndianTelecom #DigitalIndia

tweets.topic: Internet subscribers in India grew 1.1 pc in October-December 2025 quarter: TRAI
tweets.tweet: Internet subscribers in India grew 1.1% in the October-December 2025 quarter according to TRAI data. Growth is slowing down because most Indians already have internet access — now the real challenge is keeping them connected with affordable plans. #IndianTelecom #TRAIReport

tweets.topic: Vivo Y21 5G and Vivo Y11 5G Launched in India with 6,500mAh Batteries, Dimensity 6300 Chipset
tweets.tweet: Vivo Y21 5G and Y11 5G launched in India with massive 6,500mAh batteries and Dimensity 6300 chipset. Budget 5G phones that actually last all day — finally Vivo gets it right for everyday users. #Vivo5G #IndianTech
